title: Eeveelutions Reimagined
description: Bringing you the official remodeled Eeveelutions, now animated and more expressive than ever.
body:
# **Eeveelutions Reimagined**
Bringing you the official remodeled Eeveelutions — now animated and more expressive than ever before!

✨ This pack enhances the iconic Eeveelution line with custom animations, making your favorite evolutions feel more alive in the world of Cobblemon.


🧊 **Models:** Official Cobblemon Team

🎞️ **Animations:** Created by *DaDolphin*

✅ Included in Version 1.0:

* Ground Idle
* Ground Walk
* Battle Idle
* Blink
* Cry


💡 Fully compatible with Cobblemon. Just drop the resource pack in and enjoy a more dynamic experience!
